name: P-Nutty Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C). Place paper liners in a muffin tin, set aside.
2. In a medium bowl, combine flour, baking powder, cinnamon, and nutmeg. Stir with a fork until well mixed. Set aside.
3. Peel the bananas and break them into small pieces on wax paper.
4. In a large mixing bowl, stir peanut butter and sugar with a medium speed setting until blended. Scrape sides of the bowl with a rubber spatula as needed.
5. Add eggs to the mixture and blend.
6. Add the banana pieces to the mixture and blend.
7. Add the flour mixture in two stages, blending until completely incorporated without overmixing.
8. Stir in sour cream and mix until combined.
9. Spoon batter into the muffin cups, filling them about 3/4 full.
10. Bake for 25 minutes. Remove from oven and cool on a wire rack for 10 minutes before serving.
